papers_mined.title: Igloo Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Catenary/paraboloid curve resists buckling under snow compression; spiral stacking with interlocking keystones; compressive only stresses (no tension).

papers_mined.title: Adaptable Structures Arctic Tradition

papers_mined.title: Igloo Canadian Encyclopedia
papers_mined.note: Snow air-pocket insulator; ext -45°C / int -7 to 16°C body-heat; self-supporting arch leans inward; keystone-locked.

papers_mined.title: Inuit Architecture CBC
papers_mined.note: Qarmaq combines snow + ice + stones + skins + ribs/driftwood frame; low-wall + frame hybrid alternative to igloo; multi-material adaptive.
